---
title: 'Photos | Fotos'
date: '2019-06-21T15:38:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'El Amor de Calvario'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '7008125095387907528'
blogger_filename: '/p/gallary.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/El Amor de Calvario/feed.atom'
---

Here are a few highlights from our events /&nbsp;<span style="color: #212121; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; white-space: pre-wrap;">AquÃ­ hay algunos puntos destacados de nuestros eventos:</span><br />
<span style="color: #212121; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br /></span>
<span style="color: #212121; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br /></span>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-102222453-dc9a5946b42d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="523" data-original-width="1600" height="104" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-102222453-55ac76ee20c4.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-102251965-burst000-cover-top-fc03dc372f1b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-102251965-burst000-cover-top-54cd1c39a500.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-104905277-082d4c9a41dc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-104905277-d964e61cf099.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-104930322-9505191126f1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-104930322-f68bdc8d51f5.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-115957655-burst000-cover-top-1f8ee94dd6b8.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-115957655-burst000-cover-top-fec823f335de.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-115958938-burst000-cover-top-3593dd7bf7c3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-115958938-burst000-cover-top-39625af58e19.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-120001174-burst000-cover-fcaf6a9281b1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1200" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-120001174-burst000-cover-760e5986a4e7.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-120001174-burst001-animation-423a4d8be795.gif" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="972" data-original-width="730" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-120001174-burst001-animation-720659e4e737.gif" width="240" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/joshua-earle-234850-unsplash-dcd0c3fed7b1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1067" data-original-width="1600" height="213" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/joshua-earle-234850-unsplash-30ff9ef7a4f3.jpg" width="320" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><div style="font-size: medium; text-align: start;">
<span style="color: #212121; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; white-space: pre-wrap;">Cover Art </span><span style="color: #212121; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><span style="background-color: whitesmoke; color: #111111; font-family: , &quot;blinkmacsystemfont&quot; , &quot;san francisco&quot; , &quot;helvetica neue&quot; , &quot;helvetica&quot; , &quot;ubuntu&quot; , &quot;roboto&quot; , &quot;noto&quot; , &quot;segoe ui&quot; , &quot;arial&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: nowrap;">Photo by&nbsp;</span><a href="https://unsplash.com/@joshuaearle?utm_source=unsplash&amp;utm_medium=referral&amp;utm_content=creditCopyText" style="background-color: whitesmoke; box-sizing: border-box; color: #999999; font-size: 14px; transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out 0s, all 0.2s ease-in-out 0s; white-space: nowrap;">Joshua Earle</a><span style="background-color: whitesmoke; color: #111111; font-family: , &quot;blinkmacsystemfont&quot; , &quot;san francisco&quot; , &quot;helvetica neue&quot; , &quot;helvetica&quot; , &quot;ubuntu&quot; , &quot;roboto&quot; , &quot;noto&quot; , &quot;segoe ui&quot; , &quot;arial&quot; , sans-serif; font-size: 14px; white-space: nowrap;">&nbsp;on&nbsp;</span><a href="https://unsplash.com/collections/4799650/crosses?utm_source=unsplash&amp;utm_medium=referral&amp;utm_content=creditCopyText" style="background-color: whitesmoke; box-sizing: border-box; color: #999999; font-size: 14px; transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out 0s, all 0.2s ease-in-out 0s; white-space: nowrap;">Unsplash</a></span></div>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<span style="color: #212121; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br /></span>
<span style="color: #212121; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br /></span>
<span style="color: #212121; font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; white-space: pre-wrap;"><br /></span><br />
<div class="gsrt tw-ta-container tw-nfl" id="tw-target-text-container" style="background-color: white; color: #212121; font-family: Roboto, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 0px; padding-top: 20px; position: relative;">
<br /></div>
<br />
